JA

Dr Jonathan Andrews

MBBS — Medical Director
Medical Director — Men's Health & Testosterone Specialist

Dr Jonathan Andrews — 'Johnny' to his patients — is the Medical Director at Ted's Health and the clinical lead for all TRT and men's health consultations. He oversees patient care protocols, carries out one-to-one video consultations, and is the clinical authority behind every treatment plan.

Johnny also works part-time in NHS urgent care, which grounds his private practice in the realities of frontline medicine. That NHS experience means he's seen the full spectrum of men's health — from acute presentations to the chronic, slow-burn conditions that TRT is often most relevant for.

Previous clinical and digital health experience includes roles at Tandem Health, Shoorah, the HeliosX Group, and UKDHC — giving him a strong foundation in both traditional medicine and technology-enabled healthcare.

"My hope for Ted's Health is to transform the narrative around men's health, and to encourage men to seek help when something's not right."

— Dr Jonathan Andrews, Medical Director, Ted's Health

Areas of expertise

🧬
Testosterone Replacement Therapy Clinical lead for all TRT assessments, prescribing, and monitoring.
🫀
Men's Health Holistic men's health — from hormones to cardiovascular markers and metabolic health.
⚕️
Erectile Dysfunction Clinical assessment and treatment of ED, including medication selection and monitoring.
🏥
NHS Urgent Care Continues to work part-time in NHS urgent care — frontline clinical experience that informs private practice.
🩺
UK-registered doctorGMC registered
🏥
NHS & privateDual-practice clinician
📋
Medical DirectorClinical lead, Ted's Health

Ted's Health is a CQC-registered provider of men's health treatments in the UK. All treatments are UK-licensed and prescribed by registered clinicians. This page is for informational purposes. For medical advice, please consult one of our doctors.
